title: Nutty Gooey British Manchego Stir-Fry
description: A decadent and comforting one-pot dish that is perfect for a cozy night in. This Manchego-based meal is slow-cooked to perfection, resulting in a creamy and indulgent texture.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup finely chopped shallots or onions
1/4 cup chopped fresh parsley or dill

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add shallots/onions and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add crushed tomatoes and Manchego cheese; stir well to combine. Cook for an additional 10-15 minutes or until the mixture has thickened slightly and is well combined.
Stir in chopped parsley/dill and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve warm as a side dish or over rice.
